uma_factor.umapyoi.telent_factor.desc: Add more times for using training books.
uma_skill.umapyoi.adv_low_health_buff.de: Increase speed and power, increase more during low health.
uma_skill.umapyoi.adv_low_health_heal.de: Recover health, recover more during low health.
uma_skill.umapyoi.dominator.desc: Lower the speed of other entities.
uma_skill.umapyoi.inquisitive_mind.desc: Increase the attack speed, increase more when has higher wit.
uma_skill.umapyoi.low_health_buff.desc: Slightly increase speed and power, increase more during low health.
uma_skill.umapyoi.low_health_heal.desc: Slightly recover health, recover more during low health.
uma_skill.umapyoi.nutritional_supplement: Slightly recover endurance and increase health
uma_skill.umapyoi.rapid.desc: Slightly increase speed and recover endurance.
uma_skill.umapyoi.serene.desc: Slightly recover health and remove panicking.
uma_skill.umapyoi.steel_will.desc: Increase resistance, boost mood and remove panicking.
uma_skill.umapyoi.tether.desc: Slightly lower the speed of other entities.
uma_skill.umapyoi.top_umamusme.desc: Increase speed and power, boost mood.
